title: Installed update to version 148.0  failed to run for just one user
creator: gwcmarshall
content:
The user who found she could not run the new version was the user who installed the update. She returned to the previous version (which runs OK). As before the update, server access was via Pop. However her Sent and Local Folders did not appear at all on return to the earlier version and her Inbox now contained only a few recent emails from this year and emails from several earlier years was missing. She set up a second account using Imap in order to be able to retrieve all her incoming mail from the Virgin server but is still without sent mail and her local folders.

Is there any way to retrieve the missing data and to combine the IMap and Pop accounts into one?
